text:
We live in the shadow of monuments to men we were meant to forget.
We’ve built temples there.
Flush against their heels so we can carve words into the banks of their achilles.
Little prayers and promises,
Written in a language of our own.
title: STYGIAN_TOWN
encodedText: WE LIVE IN THE SHADOW OF MONUMENTS TO MEN WE WERE MEANT TO FORGET WEVE BUILT TEMPLES THERE FLUSH AGAINST THEIR HEELS SO WE CAN CARVE WORDS INTO THE BANKS OF THEIR ACHILLES LITTLE PRAYERS AND PROMISES WRITTEN IN A LANGUAGE OF OUR OWN
